text:
The basement is a location beneath the Yeager family's house in the Shiganshina District in the Attack on Titan manga and anime. Other articles with this name include:
The Basement (Chapter) - The 3rd chapter of the 21st volume and the 85th chapter overall of the Attack on Titan manga, written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama.
The Basement (Episode) - The 19th episode of the 3rd season and the 56th episode overall of the Attack on Titan anime, produced by and .
